# Atlanta Bankruptcy Statistics - Chapter 13 Dismissal Rates [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Atlanta bankruptcy statistics from 4.9M federal cases. Chapter 13 dismissal rates, filing trends, and outcome data analyzed by the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## About
bankruptcyatlanta.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Debtor Education in Atlanta - Georgia Credit Counseling &amp; Financial Management: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/debtor-education.html
- Atlanta Bankruptcy Statistics - Chapter 13 Dismissal Rates: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/
- Atlanta Bankruptcy Resources - Courts, Legal Aid, Free Tools | Bankruptcy Atlanta: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/resources.html
- NDGA Chapter 13 Statistics - Year-by-Year Data | Bankruptcy Atlanta: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/statistics.html
- What to Know About Chapter 13 in Atlanta - Consumer Guide | Bankruptcy Atlanta: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/what-to-know.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcyatlanta.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
